narrative_beat: Smartphone ilumina face na mesa de jantar

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

subject.primary: an overhead view of a modern dining table in monochrome, with a single smartphone glowing amber-crimson from below lighting a man's shadowed face watching news
subject.focal_point: the smartphone screen reflecting distant flames and scrolling headlines
subject.secondary: The face is barely visible, cheek and jaw caught in screen glow; a cold coffee cup and bread crumbs sit beside the phone
props: glowing smartphone screen in warm tones

composition.rule: overhead symmetry, phone as center light source
composition.foreground: smartphone screen and illuminated face in rich warm amber-crimson
composition.midground: black wood dining table with subtle texture
composition.background: totally desaturated black-and-white surroundings, vague kitchen shapes

lighting.key_light: phone screen as only light source, warm and harsh

style.post_processing: crushed blacks, amber highlights, naturalistic grading

symbolism.primary: modern world consuming catastrophe as content
symbolism.secondary: the smartphone as a one-way window into prophecy fulfilled

negative_as_positive: clean frame without visible text or watermarks
photorealistic documentary cinematography, not illustrated or cartoon
analog film photography aesthetic, no digital art flatness
muted desaturated background palette, warm saturated foreground only

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.
